backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Excellent Education backend, defining registration, user profile, admin config, QR code, and educational material storage, along with user approval, Stripe payment, and access control logic.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that transforms old registration records (with `collegeOrSchool`) into the new schema (with `schoolName` and `mobileNumber`), leaving all other state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: the RegistrationPage, the `/register` route in App.tsx, and the Register nav link in Layout.tsx, each with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Excellent Education Classes Website' and mounting the app at `#root`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router setup with five routes (home, admin-login, admin, live-classes, register), including the new `/register` route pointing to `RegistrationPage`.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout component with a Holi-themed header navigation bar containing Home, Live Classes, Register, and Admin Login links, plus decorative Holi splash images.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an anonymous or authenticated ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorReady.ts: Thin wrapper around `useActor` that exposes an `isReady` boolean, true only when AuthClient initialization is complete and the actor has been successfully fetched.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for interacting with the backend canister, including fetching, filtering, submitting, approving, and deleting registrations. Uses `useActorReady` to gate queries on actor availability.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines a Holi Festival-themed CSS variable palette for both light and dark modes, along with custom keyframe animations like color-splash and powder-burst.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all registrations in a searchable, sortable table with actions to approve, reject, or delete entries. Access is gated by both a hardcoded admin email in sessionStorage and an active Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page that validates a hardcoded admin email and triggers Internet Identity authentication before redirecting to the dashboard. Stores the verified email in sessionStorage on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for Excellent Education Classes featuring a hero section with logo, Holi-themed decorations, navigation buttons to live classes and admin login, and feature highlight cards.
frontend/src/pages/LiveClasses.tsx: Displays a static list of six scheduled live class sessions with subject, instructor, time, and Zoom link, styled with Holi-themed color accents per subject.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: Student registration form collecting name, mobile, email, gender, school, and class level, with validation and a success confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Holi-themed colors, custom box shadows, border radii, animations, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 21) for a Holi-themed app, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and a summary of recent changes including a new /register portal and removal of student login/registration.
